description: A vendor ('Global Stationary Ltd') has provided a CSV catalog of 15 new office supply products. Import the file 'vendor_catalog_update.csv' from the Desktop into Odoo's product catalog. Ensure the following data mappings are applied: 'Item Name' to 'Product Name', 'SKU' to 'Internal Reference', 'Category' to 'Product Category' (creating new categories if they don't exist), 'RRP' to 'Sales Price', 'Wholesale Cost' to 'Cost', and 'Weight (kg)' to 'Weight'. Verify that all 15 products are created with the correct data.
